ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the assessment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was created */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., Draft, Active, Completed) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the assessment belongs to */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the assessment belongs to */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the assessment is based on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the criterion belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., Depth of Knowledge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criterion in the overall assessment score */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the criterion is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criteria_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_standards" (
  "evaluation_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation standard */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion the evaluation standard belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation standard (e.g., Excellent, Good) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation standard */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Score range for the evaluation standard (e.g., 9-10, 7-8) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the evaluation standard is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_standards_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the presentation belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the presentation */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the presentation belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the presentation was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the presentation (e.g., Submitted, Graded) */,
  "presentation_format" TEXT /* Format of the presentation (e.g., Individual, Group) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the presentation was given */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the presentation in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentation_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presentation the score belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion the score belongs to */,
  "evaluation_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation standard the score belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned by the instructor */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "grading_date" TEXT /* Date the score was assigned */,
  "grading_status" TEXT /* Status of the grading (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentation_scores_evaluation_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_standard_id") REFERENCES evaluation_standards ("evaluation_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentation_scores_presentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("presentation_id") REFERENCES presentations ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentation_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the group belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the group */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the group (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the member belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who is a member of the group */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the group (e.g., Leader, Member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the instructor is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., Lecturer, Professor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_files" (
  "submission_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission file */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presentation the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, PPTX) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the file is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_files_presentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("presentation_id") REFERENCES presentations ("presentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presentation the feedback belongs to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., General, Detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_presentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("presentation_id") REFERENCES presentations ("presentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the template belongs to */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the template is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_criteria" (
  "template_criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template criterion */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template the criterion belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criterion in the template */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the criterion is active in the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_criteria_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES assessment_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_criteria_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the assignment belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
